subTitle: Host Amanda Herrera grills up two dinner recipes using patty pan summer squash and cabbage that she picked up from the market.

subTitle: Amanda makes burgers and fries using ingredients from the market.

subTitle: Using cream, sunflower oil and cherry tomatoes from the market, Amanda makes a pasta recipe and an indulgent dessert.

subTitle: Chef Michael Bonacini explores the bold and hearty flavours of the southern region of Basilicata with dishes like Pollo Alla Potentina.

subTitle: Chef Michael Bonacini shares the secrets of Molise with four of his favourite dishes.

subTitle: Chef Michael Bonacini inspires with warm hearty meals from the region of Valle D'Aosta including a wholesome Chestnut Fettucine.

title: Global Veggies

title: Bonacini's Italy
subTitle: Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights; chef Michael Bonacini introduces the region's fine cuisine with four of his favorite dishes, drawing attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture.

title: Bonacini's Italy
subTitle: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all; an antipasto of succulent soft shell crab is paired with a tangy aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy.

title: One World Kitchen
subTitle: Corn is a big staple ingredient in Argentinian cuisine, and chef Natalia Machado makes tamales, corn and squash and chorizo stew, chicken in a creamy corn sauce, and then creamy corn pudding for dessert.

title: One World Kitchen
subTitle: Argentinian chef Natalia Machado creates popular dishes from the Patagonia area, including lamb empanadas, King Crab pie, fish in a salt crust, and Patagonian fruit cake.

title: Mucho Machado
subTitle: Chef Natalia Machado prepares dishes in real time, offering viewers an engaging glimpse into both on-set and off-set kitchen dynamics, with episodes in English and Spanish.

subTitle: Natalia makes an Argentine citrus and spiced salmon, burnt ricotta salad and lamb two ways.

subTitle: Chef Spencer Watts adds bread and pastry to Canadian cod and squid.
